note on sources: It's simple to not mark it as fore-feast. Make sure to keep troparia in sync.
day name: Fore-feast of the Procession of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross of the Lord; The Holy and Just Eudocimus
name: Eudocimus
crossDismissal: , the veneration of Which we celebrate today
troparia: (Tone 4) Holy Eudocimus, God called you out of this world and led you to the eternal mansions.* He will keep your body incorrupt.* You lived a life of wisdom and honour, keeping your body pure.* Intercede trustingly with Christ that He may save all of us.
(Tone 1) Save Your people, O Lord, and bless Your inheritance.* Grant victory to Your faithful people [to our faithful King N.] against enemies** and protect Your community by Your cross.
kontakia: (Tone 2) You yearned for the things of heaven,* and you achieved union with them.* You perfected your soul like a fiery chariot by means of the ladder of good works.* Most blessed Eudocimus, since you lived your life on earth like an angel,* now you have received the Creator’s seal.

(Tone 4) The heavens surpassed the sun in brilliance,* for the Cross illumines everything with its radiance;* enlighten our minds and senses by its power,* O true Lover of Mankind, Saviour of all creation.* We have the Cross as an armour of peace and a trophy of strength.
